query:
SELECT 
  id,
  gameDate,
  awayTeam,
  homeTeam,
  startTimeEst,
  awayBookSpread, awaySpreadOdds,
  homeBookSpread, homeSpreadOdds,
  bookTotal, overOdds, underOdds,
  awayML, homeML,
  openAwaySpread, openAwaySpreadOdds,
  openHomeSpread, openHomeSpreadOdds,
  openTotal, openAwayML, openHomeML
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-26' AND id >= 2250013
ORDER BY startTimeEst;
command:
